pages.text: $(8)The emote system allows a whole new layer of self expression! $(br2)The emote wheel is displayed using they emote wheel keybind ('Y' by default). This has many cool emotes that your character will be able to play. It also has an orange button which is the Morph button, and will automatically switch your shape from Player to Wild Cat and Wild Cat to Player.$(br)
pages.title: Emote System

pages.text: $(8)The emote wheel has currently plenty of emotes, and more added through updates! $(br)
